description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a medium-sized bird with a streamlined body and a long, straight tail. The plumage is predominantly dark brown with lighter speckling and subtle mottling along the wings and back, giving it a natural, camouflaged appearance. The beak is slender, slightly curved, and pointed, suitable for probing or picking at food. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the tail feathers are elongated and taper to a subtle point. The legs are not clearly visible, but the overall posture suggests a perching or ground-dwelling bird. The surface texture appears matte with a slight roughness, mimicking the look of real feathers.
description: A medium-sized, dark brown bird with a long, straight tail and a slender, slightly curved beak. The plumage is mottled and speckled, giving it a natural, camouflaged look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, long tail, and slender beak, with mottled brown plumage visible along the back and wings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow head, pointed beak, and the symmetry of the folded wings and tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, displaying the bird's profile, long tail, and subtle feather patterning.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the broad back, the arrangement of the tail feathers, and the overall width of the body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mottled and speckled with lighter spots on a dark brown base
